creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
To committer [with bugmeister hat]: what you're seeing here is the result of frustration with where we are w/rt chromium.

We know we're behind, and we know we need more hands to work on it.  The codebase is so immense that a lot of hard work has to go into testing.  Everyone is frustrated, and "you need to update" is something we already know, sorry :-/
